message:
test(readme): GalaxyBrainCard + DecisionRecord field-level coverage

GalaxyBrainCard has 4 fields (title/equation/substitution/intuition)
and a render_plain() method. Existing test only asserted
!title.is_empty(); the other 3 fields + render method were uncovered.

DecisionRecord has 7 fields total — previous test asserted on
mode/action/issue.kind/evidence; the remaining 3 (ts_unix_ms,
prior_compatible, metrics) and the DecisionMetrics struct's 5 f64
fields were uncovered.

Extends readme_bayesian_runtime_policy with assertions:

GalaxyBrainCard:
- All 4 fields are non-empty strings
- render_plain() returns a non-empty rendered string

DecisionRecord:
- ts_unix_ms > 0 (populated from system clock)
- prior_compatible ∈ [0, 1] (valid probability)

DecisionMetrics:
- posterior_compatible ∈ [0, 1]
- bayes_factor_compatible_over_incompatible ≥ 0
- expected_loss_{allow,reject,repair} fields readable

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.51.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
